bns:Component.name: HROpsConsole - Get Dashboard
bns:Component.bns:description: Returns KPI metrics, time saved estimates, and priority queue for HR Ops Console dashboard

message.msgTxt: '{"kpis":{"openCases":7,"criticalCases":2,"overdueManagerActions":4,"complianceAlerts":12,"syncErrors":9,"payrollExceptions":4,"retentionRisk":3},"timeSavedDefaults":{"hourlyRate":50,"baselineHours":7,"weeklyHoursSaved":3,"weeklyDollarSavings":150,"annualSavings":7800},"casesByStatus":[{"status":"Open","count":3},{"status":"Investigation","count":1},{"status":"Under Review","count":1},{"status":"Critical","count":1},{"status":"Approved","count":1}],"priorityQueue":[{"title":"Terminated Employee Active in Payroll","severity":"Critical","category":"Integration","dueDate":"2024-03-03","caseId":"C-2024-005"},{"title":"Pay Discrepancy Grievance SLA Approaching","severity":"Critical","category":"Case","dueDate":"2024-03-10","caseId":"C-2024-003"},{"title":"COBRA Notice Required - Omar Hassan","severity":"Critical","category":"Benefits","dueDate":"2024-04-13","employeeId":"E015"},{"title":"Deactivate payroll record for E015","severity":"Critical","category":"Task","dueDate":"2024-03-02","caseId":"C-2024-005"},{"title":"Audit payroll records 6 months - Jordan Williams","severity":"High","category":"Task","dueDate":"2024-03-05","caseId":"C-2024-003"},{"title":"Collect manager written statement","severity":"High","category":"Task","dueDate":"2024-03-05","caseId":"C-2024-001"},{"title":"Harassment Prevention Training Overdue - Patel","severity":"High","category":"Compliance","dueDate":"2024-01-31","employeeId":"E002"},{"title":"Safety Training Module 1 Overdue - Thompson","severity":"High","category":"Compliance","dueDate":"2024-01-15","employeeId":"E005"},{"title":"PIP Initiated - Derek Thompson","severity":"High","category":"Case","dueDate":"2024-04-01","caseId":"C-2024-006"},{"title":"ADP Salary Discrepancy - Jordan Williams","severity":"Critical","category":"Integration","dueDate":null,"employeeId":"E003"}]}'
